title: P-Foundation handoff complete; P1 next
body: Glittering Weaving Quasar completed the P-Foundation handoff sweep: no active claims, no live escalation files, entrypoints still point at AGENT.md, and no new ADR/PDR graduation candidate was opened. P0.QG and P-Foundation are complete; next implementation opener is P1 B-11 directed-message authoring in the unified agent-tools CLI shape.
